title: Blue Balloons, 20pcs Light Blue, White, Dark Blue & Confetti, 12 inch, Mixed Color, Unisex, Children & Adult, Balloons, Blue Theme, Wide Application, Customer Service
features: 🎈【Blue Theme】:The balloon set include latex dark blue balloons,light blue balloons,white balloons and clear balloons with blue confetti,5 pieces for each color.
🎈【12 inch】:All the balloons are 12 inch after inflating,about 30 cm,large enough for you to make balloon arch or celebrate the special day.
🎈【High quality】:Balloons are made of high quality material,non-toxic and durable.If you inflated with air,it will last for a long time.
🎈【Wide Application】:Latex light blue,white,dark blue and confetti balloons will meet all your need for a party,mixed color will crate strong party atmosphere.
🎈【Customer Service】:If you have any questions,please feel free to contact us,we will solve it for you in 8 hours.
description: 【Mixed Color】:This balloon set include deep green, white, black and clear balloons with green confetti, every color are 5pcs.
